title: Projects
selectCompany: Select a company to view projects.

newProjectDialog.title: New project
newProjectDialog.repoUrlTooltip: Link a GitHub repository so agents can clone, read, and push code for this project.
newProjectDialog.localFolderTooltip: Set an absolute path on this machine where local agents will read and write files for this project.

errors.absolutePathRequired: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
errors.invalidRepoUrl: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.

archive.descriptionArchive: Archive this project to hide it from the sidebar and project selectors.
archive.descriptionUnarchive: Unarchive this project to restore it in the sidebar and project selectors.

properties.envDescription: Applied to all runs for issues in this project. Project values override agent env on key conflicts.

codebase.title: Codebase
codebase.help: Repo identifies the source of truth. Local folder is the default place agents write code.
codebase.additionalLegacyWorkspaces: Additional legacy workspace records exist on this project. Paperclip is using the primary workspace as the codebase view.

executionWorkspaces.title: Execution Workspaces
executionWorkspaces.help: Project-owned defaults for isolated issue checkouts and execution workspace behavior.
executionWorkspaces.enableIsolatedDescription: Let issues choose between the project's primary checkout and an isolated execution workspace.
executionWorkspaces.newIssuesDefault: New issues default to isolated checkout
executionWorkspaces.newIssuesDefaultDescription: If disabled, new issues stay on the project's primary checkout unless someone opts in.
executionWorkspaces.provisionTeardownHint: Provision runs inside the derived worktree before agent execution. Teardown is stored here for future cleanup flows.

errors.absolutePathRequired: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
errors.invalidRepoUrl: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.
